title: You know youre posting on evageeks when
display_title: You know youre posting on evageeks when
wikitext:
[]: You know you're posting on evageeks when... Post by Grimmjow » Sun May 01, 2011 3:28 pm You know you're posting on evageeks when you can post an extremely long and complex thread about the symbolism of fapping in NGE. *You know the drill*

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Sun May 01, 2011 4:56 pm You know your posting on EvaGeeks when your address bar reads “evageeks.org” and you're typing a reply or starting a thread.

[]: Post by Clover » Sun May 01, 2011 5:50 pm This thread is bad and you should feel bad.

[]: Post by Tarnsman » Sun May 01, 2011 5:53 pm TehDonutKing wrote: You know your posting on EvaGeeks when your address bar reads “evageeks.org” and you're typing a reply or starting a thread.

[]: Post by C.A.P. » Sun May 01, 2011 6:17 pm You're learning (or finding) more about all things anime better than 5 forums dedicated to animation combined.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sun May 01, 2011 6:37 pm This is how I know I'm reading EGF.

[]: Post by Fazmotron » Sun May 01, 2011 6:40 pm You know you're posting on evageeks when constant threads like this, all ending in ...

[]: Post by symbv » Sun May 01, 2011 6:58 pm Let's see how long this can last before this thread gets locked.

[]: Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun May 01, 2011 7:11 pm "I think we're done here."

[]: Post by Sachi » Sun May 01, 2011 10:03 pm I know I'm posting on EvaGeeks when I get to lock bad threads. :)
